title: NMT Quiz Question
description: A single multiple-choice question from the Ukrainian NMT/ZNO exam database.

id.description: Unique question ID. Prefix 'osy_' = osyvokon/zno dataset (Language, History). Prefix 'nlp_' = NLPForUA dataset (Math, Geography).

subject.description: Subject/topic the question belongs to. Used to select a question pool when creating a game room.

text.description: The full question text in Ukrainian. May contain mathematical expressions in plain Unicode text format (e.g. 'x^2', 'log_2(x)').

choices.description: Array of answer option texts in Ukrainian. Length is always 2–5. Array index corresponds to the answer label (0=А, 1=Б, 2=В, 3=Г, 4=Д). All matching/correspondence question types (>5 options) have been pre-filtered out.

correct_answer_index.description: Zero-based index into the 'choices' array pointing to the correct answer. NEVER send this field to the client until the round timer expires.

exam_type.description: Exam series this question is from. Currently all questions are tagged 'ZNO_NMT_General' since source datasets do not provide year metadata.
